metadata.description: The management group ID where policies and initiative will be deployed
The subscription ID where the UAMI will be created
The name of the resource group where the UAMI will be deployed (will be created if it doesn't exist)
Azure region where the UAMI resource will be deployed
Name of the User-Assigned Managed Identity to be created
Tags to apply to all deployed resources
Name for the custom policy definition that assigns UAMI to VMs
Name for the custom policy definition that deploys Custom Script Extension to VMs
Name for the policy initiative (set) that combines both policy definitions
